channel.title: Xiaomi 15 Ultra MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 15 Ultra MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.2.0.VOATRXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra Turkey

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS2.0.2.0.VOATRXM | 15.0

Size: 9.9 GB

MD5: 9cd5bbab6fd5f8248a7b8c1551f1d8f7

Changelog:
[Alive Design Philosophy]
Alive Design Philosophy unveils fresh, vibrant design across the whole system, making every interaction feel smooth and alive.
All-new Artistic Lock screen:
Artistic Lock screen brings new templates and effects inspired by classic designs, giving your device a cinematic look every time you unlock it.
All-new Gallery:
With AI and reorganized collections, Gallery makes your memories even more vivid.
All-new Weather
Real-time Weather Engine 2.0 shows you the sky and clouds just like in real life – even lets you see rainbows and the Milky Way.
All-new Calendar:
The new Desktop calendar adds a touch of ritual to your day.
All-new Clock:
Updated Clock uses a more refined display structure for a more elegant, easy-to-read look.
Updated animations:
A full-scale animation upgrade makes every interaction flow smoothly and feel stable, responsive, and comfortable.
[Xiaomi HyperCore]
Xiaomi HyperCore, Xiaomi's proprietary core technology platform, enhances performance, graphics, network, and security.
New microarchitecture scheduler:
A new in-house microarchitecture scheduler manages tasks more efficiently.
New dynamic memory:
New technology allows precise resource allocation, so apps start up faster.
Storage 2.0:
Improved file loading for long-term smooth performance.
Upgraded rendering:
Upgraded rendering for multitasking extends battery life.
Heterogeneous computing:
Enhanced rendering pipeline boosts hardware performance for faster, more efficient visuals.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.2.0.VOATRXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra Turkey

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS2.0.2.0.VOATRXM | 15.0

Size: 8.3 GB

MD5: fe2bce7b11644284d390745103d23d05

Changelog:
[Alive Design Philosophy]
Alive Design Philosophy unveils fresh, vibrant design across the whole system, making every interaction feel smooth and alive.
All-new Artistic Lock screen:
Artistic Lock screen brings new templates and effects inspired by classic designs, giving your device a cinematic look every time you unlock it.
All-new Gallery:
With AI and reorganized collections, Gallery makes your memories even more vivid.
All-new Weather
Real-time Weather Engine 2.0 shows you the sky and clouds just like in real life – even lets you see rainbows and the Milky Way.
All-new Calendar:
The new Desktop calendar adds a touch of ritual to your day.
All-new Clock:
Updated Clock uses a more refined display structure for a more elegant, easy-to-read look.
Updated animations:
A full-scale animation upgrade makes every interaction flow smoothly and feel stable, responsive, and comfortable.
[Xiaomi HyperCore]
Xiaomi HyperCore, Xiaomi's proprietary core technology platform, enhances performance, graphics, network, and security.
New microarchitecture scheduler:
A new in-house microarchitecture scheduler manages tasks more efficiently.
New dynamic memory:
New technology allows precise resource allocation, so apps start up faster.
Storage 2.0:
Improved file loading for long-term smooth performance.
Upgraded rendering:
Upgraded rendering for multitasking extends battery life.
Heterogeneous computing:
Enhanced rendering pipeline boosts hardware performance for faster, more efficient visuals.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.303.0.WOACNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra China

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS3.0.303.0.WOACNXM | 16.0

Size: 12.8 GB

MD5: 0482b6b0195ac27c4f56a3716cc67310

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Zenless Zone Zero couldn't be controlled or crashed in some cases
Fix: Audiobook apps consumed a lot of power during Always-on display standby in some cases
Fix: Background service issues made devices reboot unexpectedly in some cases
Fix: Gallery photos couldn't be shared as PDF via Touch to share
Fix: Volume buttons sometimes used haptic feedback even when it was turned off
Updated the security patch to March 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.303.0.WOACNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra China
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra China

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS3.0.303.0.WOACNXM | 16.0

Size: 10.0 GB

MD5: 719482c5d6b4c45a3a3756a28ff2c41d

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Zenless Zone Zero couldn't be controlled or crashed in some cases
Fix: Audiobook apps consumed a lot of power during Always-on display standby in some cases
Fix: Background service issues made devices reboot unexpectedly in some cases
Fix: Gallery photos couldn't be shared as PDF via Touch to share
Fix: Volume buttons sometimes used haptic feedback even when it was turned off
Updated the security patch to March 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOAMIXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra Global

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOAMIXM | 16.0

Size: 11.8 GB

MD5: d98a2e098d554fc03ac4ce4bcee3b155

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOAINXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra India
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra India

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOAINXM | 16.0

Size: 9.6 GB

MD5: c92672ab0dcbac9f13c69fcd80f943d2

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOAMIXM | 16.0

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings

Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days

Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time

Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos

New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOARUXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra Russia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra Russia

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOARUXM | 16.0

Size: 11.5 GB

MD5: 5d7af85fed62f8b9e08eaa3027c546d5

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases

New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time

Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.description:

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOAIDXM | 16.0

MD5: 2709984b3379a4b35a8957ad6e279062

[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time

Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOAINXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra India
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra India

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOAINXM | 16.0

Size: 8.8 GB

MD5: 87fd4634562d318b8f1c4e8fa1ef5882

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOATWXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra Taiwan

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOATWXM | 16.0

Size: 8.8 GB

MD5: f2dce31ab6211e1d1bcdcd0e1b851c0d

[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time

Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
Optimization: Power consumption efficiency when watching short videos
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup
